raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/scrub>, 2026, I booked a rental home for my family using Citis credit card. The homes location was completely misrepresented in the advertisement. I submitted a dispute with Citi and supplied supporting evidence, including screenshots of the advertised location and where the homes actual location was. Ultimately, the merchant, XXXX, misrepresented the location of the home. As a result of this, I lost {$980.00} out of a total of {$1300.00}. 

Citi then sent me a denial of my dispute without providing an explanation of what exactly the deficiency in evidence was and did not provide me an opportunity to supply any additional supporting information before coming to a decision.
